_meta.provenance: Extracted from Khelo_Bharat_Visual_Blueprint.html. Sequencing is Proposed; month ranges are planning estimates, not committed dates. No government timeline has been approved.

principle: Registries before workflows, workflows before benefits, benefits before AI. Each phase ends with a measurable gate that must pass before the next begins.

phases.name: Foundation
activities: Data evaluation #1 through the M20 framework
phases.gate: Master registries live; first data MoU signed or declined with reasons.

phases.name: MVP
activities: School App pilot in 2 states (M5, M6)
phases.gate: 50,000 verified profiles; scheme cycle time −30%; pilot screening covers >80% of schools.

phases.name: Benefits & Scale
phases.gate: 1 lakh+ cards issued; 500+ jobs listed; all national events on platform.

phases.name: Intelligence
activities: AI talent engine at full strength
phases.gate: Index published quarterly; marks pilot with ≥2 boards; AI shortlists adopted by selection committees.

immediateMoves.move: Request the SAI organisation structure — org chart, sanctioned posts and nodal officers.
Seed the federation registry — load the MYAS recognised-NSF list and NSF portal data.
Run data evaluation #1 — the pro bono offer through the M20 framework: sample under NDA, pilot decision in 4–6 weeks.
Open the NPCI conversation — concept note for the co-branded RuPay card; shortlist issuing banks; draft benefit MoUs.
Prepare the Summit pack — the Marks for Sports policy note plus the Jobs for Sports pledge programme.
Pick pilot geographies — two states + two high-performing KIRTI districts for the screening and scout pilots.
Stand up the design system — approve the visual identity and component library.
